name: esign-sign
_note: tools.esign-sign applies a tamper-evident HMAC-SHA256 signature for one party in an envelope from globalThis._concordSTATE.toolsLens.envelopes (per-user via ctx.actor.userId). STATE-backed with an internal owner actor — an empty {} (or unknown ids) returns the real validation reason 'envelope not found' (NEVER no_db). When the last party signs, the envelope status flips to 'completed'.
